name: Western Union
description_short: Western Union in Baltimore, MD at 1611 W North Ave offers money transfers and check cashing services.
description_long:
Located at 1611 W North Ave in Baltimore, MD, this Western Union location provides convenient access to money transfer and check-cashing services in the city. The store is open Monday through Friday from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM, Saturday 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM, and Sunday 8:30 AM to 6:00 PM, making it accessible for Baltimore residents throughout the week.

This Baltimore Western Union location specializes in domestic and international money transfers, bill payments, and check cashing. You can reach the store at +1 410-728-8662 to confirm current services, ask about fees, or get help with your transfer.

Whether you're sending money to family, cashing a check, or paying bills in Baltimore, this W North Ave location is designed for quick, straightforward transactions. Bring a valid government-issued ID and your payment method (cash or debit card) for money transfers. This Western Union location provides reliable service for Baltimore residents and visitors.
pros: Extensive physical location network through partnerships with Walmart, Safeway, City Market, Kroger, and Circle K for convenient cash pickup
24/7 online service capability through WU.com for initiating transfers anytime
Multilingual support in six languages including Spanish, Haitian Creole, and Chinese, addressing immigrant communities
Inmate payment services for incarcerated individuals—a specialized service most competitors don't offer
Western Union Rewards loyalty program providing benefits for frequent users
Multiple payment options including mobile top-up, bill payment, and prepaid card deposits
Real-time transfer tracking capability allowing customers to monitor their transactions
cons: Fees for wire transfers and money orders can be substantial, especially for international transfers, making the service expensive for frequent users
Exchange rates on currency conversions are typically less favorable than bank rates or online transfer services
Limited transparency on pricing displayed within the website content itself—customers must request estimates or check at agent locations
Technical issues noted in website content (Orange wallet temporarily unavailable) indicate occasional service disruptions
Geolocation features may not work reliably depending on browser settings, limiting location-finding convenience
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers without access to traditional bank accounts who need reliable cash transfer services
Immigrants and international money senders who need multilingual support and familiar brand recognition for overseas remittances
Individuals sending money to incarcerated family members, as Western Union uniquely offers inmate payment services
Consumers in rural or underserved areas near Walmart, Safeway, or convenience stores who need accessible physical cash pickup locations
diagnosis: Western Union is best for unbanked consumers, immigrants sending international remittances, and those needing cash pickup at convenient retail locations. The main caveat is that fees and exchange rates are significantly higher than traditional banks or online transfer services, making this option expensive for cost-conscious users who should compare alternatives before sending money.
services: Domestic and international wire transfers initiated online or in-store
Cash pickup at 150+ agent locations across multiple states and countries
Money order services (with some locations offering this exclusively)
Bill payment processing through online portal and in-store agents
Western Union Prepaid Card with direct money deposit capability
Mobile top-up service for international phone recharges
Inmate payment services for sending money to incarcerated individuals
Transfer tracking system allowing real-time transaction monitoring
Western Union Rewards loyalty program with referral bonuses
Price estimation tools for calculating transfer costs before sending
Delivery method updates and management for received funds
Multilingual customer support in six languages
meta_description: Western Union at 1611 W North Ave, Baltimore, MD. Money transfers, check cashing, and more.
